title: Large Mortar and Pestle - 4 Cup Unpolished Granite Bowl Molcajete Mexican Mortar Handmade Stone Grinder for Guacamole Pastes Pestos in Family Day, Mortar and Pestle, Gray, 8 Inches
description:
About this item
Large Capacity: The Mortar dimension: 3.54 H x 7.87 W x 7.87 D inches, about 3-4 cups of large capacity. and the pestle: 3.93 H x 1.96 W. The deep groove design makes it difficult for ingredients to jump out. And the large capacity can satisfy a variety of sauces for family days.
DIY Sauce Grinding Tool: An essential sauce grinding tool for every home, use granite mortar and pestle to grind, crush, mash and mix any grain, spice or herb to make dishes including guacamole, salad dressings, sauces, recipes and any sauce you like.
Excellent Material: The mortar and pestle set is made of 100% natural granite, the texture is hard and safe to use.
Easy to Clean: The mortar and pestle set is easy to use, hand-wash and re-use.
Unique Design: Overall it bears a classic design. The traditional hand grinding method enables the material to fully exude its flavor, to achieves the best taste and fragrance. The best grinding tool of choice.
reviews_5s:
Great size mortar easy to use large enough to do your avocados and other spices. The large mortar is very sturdy very functional the value for your money . Easy to clean . I will be buying another one. One for only spice and the other one for avocado and other wet mixture.For years we've used a smallish (probably medium sized) ceramic mortar with a wooden pestle. It has served its purpose but takes a lot long than it should and its finesse is limited. I ordered this unpolished stone molcajete thinking that at minimum I could handle more at a time with it. That has proven to be true, for sure, but I can also tell you that every aspect of the molcajete is even better than anticipated. It arrived well packaged which was good because this thing is all rock and is quite heavy. The 8” size is pretty large and the entire thing looks pretty impressive even in its unpolished stone state. The mortar is very well made, has lovely grooves, and thanks to its weight it holds nice and still while you use it. The pestle looks unwieldy at first but the shape is perfect for fitting in the hand and the weight of it really aids in grinding. Others in my family have used it as well and we are all quite impressed with how well it works and how easy it is to use. I absolutely do not regret ordering it and it is a welcome addition to our family cooking tools....My wife needed something to crush up her dried herbs. This worked great. Easy to use, built well and the weight is perfect. It worked great to crush the dried herbs for storageThis mortar and pestle set is just wow! The craftsmanship is beyond what I expected. It is comfortable to hold onto even when what you’re working on is taking forever. The set is pretty heavy but it will last us forever with how thick it is. It cleans up easy and has made my desire to k ow what’s in my food more of a reality!This is the mortar and pestle you want! I can't rave about it enough. First of all, the size is so large, you could make salsas or guacamole right in here and use it as the bowl. The material is definitely high quality, it's rough, as it should be, so you get a perfect grind of whatever ingredients you're using. It is heavyweight so don't drop it! Clean up is super easy and it doesn't retain any smells. If you enjoy grinding up your own seasonings/pastes/etc do not look any further. You cannot beat the value of this.I had a very tiny marble mortar and pestle and wanted something similar but larger. This one is perfect. The size is huge; you can see the attached pictures for a comparison. Its size means you can grind more which is just what I needed. We've used it to make mofongo for plantains. The quality is great and is exactly what you would expect from this type of product.

I recommend it.This mortar and pestle set is awesome. It's pretty large, looks great, and is definitely granite or diorite or somewhere in between. Very low porosity. Grinds like a champ, it's hefty, and makes a good centerpiece on my kitchen island. I used it to grind some cloves the other day for a pumpkin doughnut bundt cake, 11/10 would recommend this mortar's pulverization powers.This is the largest mortar and pestle I have ever seen. It is a rough design, not smooth or shiny. Because it so large you can easily grind larger seeds or nuts without having to empty as you go. Really great for creating a crumble pie crust from nuts, seeds, or even cookies! Very nice. Now I just have to find a place to keep it!This molcajete bowl is very fancy! Its a great size and fun to make guacamole in for entertaining since it is 4 cups! Great quality and feel. The unpolished surface and weight are perfect, very authentic.I love the size of this set. It is heavy-duty, durable, and works well. This is an excellent piece for preparing foods in larger batches. I love the sheer size of this and the way it looks. The current price is incredible, and the quality is beyond worth it!
